raw.subject: Your Canton page caught my eye, Market Heights Barbershop!
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the rustic feel of your barber shop's interior, especially the old barber chairs in the photo you shared. It really gives off a classic, hometown vibe.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers who want to look up hours or your services before stopping by. I'm guessing you get a lot of calls from people trying to confirm your hours or location.

I took a look at your Facebook page and thought I'd sketch out a simple homepage idea that might help you showcase your business. I included a menu hero section with some of the great Suavecito and Crew Products you offer, as well as a photo gallery to highlight your talented barbers at work.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/market-heights-barbershop-canton

If you're interested in exploring this further, I'd be happy to chat about a simple, straightforward project that fits your budget as a local business. Just reply to this email or give me a quick call to discuss.
